name: Bounty Hunter
short_description: In the game, you are a bounty hunter, and your daily job is to take on all kinds of monster hunting tasks to earn commissions. Now the northern town of SnowField has been attacked by wolves. Many bounty hunters have been there and no return, and you have also received an invitation from the mayor.
detailed_description:
About game

This game can't be upLv by killing monsters. Role promotion is mainly achieved through career choice and skill upgrading. So the character's attributes don't change very much. In addition, only when you create a character, you can select the attributes to improve it. (Individuals don't like the type of upLv. ) Thanks for your comments. If you have any comments and suggestions, you can send them to my mailbox: 496027673@qq.com. About the problem that the comment model is not good-looking and the action is not good. Because of limited funds, this game is not AAA game, and naturally can not be compared with them, if the model and action is very gorgeous, it is not a game of 6 $.


Latest updates

Updated UI layout, now looks better. Task hints and help panels were added.


About the Game

In the game, you are a bounty hunter, and your daily job is to take on all kinds of monster hunting tasks to earn commissions. Now the northern town of SnowField has been attacked by wolves. Many bounty hunters have been there and no return, and you have also received an invitation from the mayor. In view of the shyness in the bag, you decided to go and explore it. You can use all kinds of weapons to fight in the game. Different weapons have different operational effects. You can use the trophies you get from killing monsters in exchange for money. The game uses a special food pattern, so that food is no longer a chicken rib but a must. Food doesn't directly revert to your blood volume, it restores your energy. All of your recovery in the game consumes energy, and when you run out of energy, all of your recovery will drop to a very low level. More details would like you to experience in the game.

Many bounty hunters have been there and no return, and you have also received an invitation from the mayor. In view of the shyness in the bag, you decided to go and explore it.
You can use all kinds of weapons to fight in the game. Different weapons have different operational effects.
You can use the trophies you get from killing monsters in exchange for money.
The game uses a special food pattern, so that food is no longer a chicken rib but a must.
Food doesn't directly revert to your blood volume, it restores your energy.
All of your recovery in the game consumes energy, and when you run out of energy, all of your recovery will drop to a very low level.
